THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBB, FLOYD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 216 EDDY STREET #313 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUL-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, SEC. DEP. OF $128.00 RETAINED BY PLTF. AS PARTIAL PMT.OF REASONABLY INCURRED ATTY. FEES AND COST. PERS. PRPTY. ON PREMISE AFTER 7/30/96 12:00 P.M. IS PERS. PRPTY. OF PLTF. THERE IS A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM THIS ACTION. SECTION CIVIL CODE 1542 IS ALSO APPLICABLE.
